results.question: Какой средний результат участников в соревновании House Price?
results.expected_sql: SELECT AVG(lr.score) FROM competition c JOIN participation p ON p.competition_id = c.competition_id JOIN leaderboard_row lr ON lr.participation_id = p.participation_id WHERE c.title ILIKE '%House Price%'
results.generated_sql:
SELECT AVG(lr.score) AS avg_score
FROM competition c
  JOIN participation p ON p.competition_id = c.competition_id
  LEFT JOIN leaderboard_row lr ON lr.participation_id = p.participation_id
WHERE c.title ILIKE '%House Price%';

results.question: Топ 5 участников по лучшему результату среди соревнований по регрессии
results.expected_sql: SELECT u.username, lr.score FROM task_type tt JOIN competition c ON c.task_type_id = tt.task_type_id JOIN participation p ON p.competition_id = c.competition_id JOIN leaderboard_row lr ON lr.participation_id = p.participation_id JOIN user u ON u.user_id = p.user_id WHERE tt.code = 'regression' ORDER BY lr.score DESC LIMIT 5
results.generated_sql:
SELECT lr.score, u.username
FROM competition c
JOIN task_type t ON c.task_type_id = t.task_type_id
JOIN participation p ON p.competition_id = c.competition_id
JOIN leaderboard_row lr ON lr.participation_id = p.participation_id
JOIN user u ON u.user_id = p.user_id
WHERE t.code = 'regression'
  AND c.title ILIKE '%House Price%'
ORDER BY lr.score DESC
LIMIT 5;

judge.error: SQL запрос возвращает неверные столбцы. Вместо 'lr.score' и 'u.username' должны быть возвращены данные о лучших результатах участников среди соревнований по регрессии.

results.question: Какие соревнования организовала alice?
results.expected_sql: SELECT c.title FROM competition c JOIN "user" u ON u.user_id = c.organizer_id WHERE u.username = 'alice'
results.generated_sql:
SELECT c.title
FROM competition c
JOIN user u ON c.organizer_id = u.user_id
WHERE u.username = 'alice';

results.question: Сколько участий в каждом соревновании?
results.expected_sql: SELECT c.title, COUNT(p.participation_id) FROM competition c JOIN participation p ON p.competition_id = c.competition_id GROUP BY c.title ORDER BY COUNT(p.participation_id) DESC
results.generated_sql:
SELECT c.title, COUNT(p.participation_id) AS participants_count
FROM competition c
JOIN participation p ON c.competition_id = p.competition_id
GROUP BY c.title;

results.question: Список всех соревнований с типом задачи classification
results.expected_sql: SELECT c.title FROM task_type tt JOIN competition c ON c.task_type_id = tt.task_type_id WHERE tt.code = 'classification'
results.generated_sql:
SELECT c.title
FROM task_type tt
JOIN competition c ON c.task_type_id = tt.task_type_id
WHERE tt.code = 'classification';

results.question: Активные соревнования с количеством участников
results.expected_sql: SELECT c.title, COUNT(p.participation_id) FROM competition c LEFT JOIN participation p ON p.competition_id = c.competition_id WHERE c.status = 'active' GROUP BY c.title ORDER BY COUNT(p.participation_id) DESC
results.generated_sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.participation_id) AS participants
FROM competition c
  JOIN participation p ON c.competition_id = p.competition_id
WHERE c.status = 'active';

judge.error: SELECT возвращает неверные столбцы: вместо списка имён возвращается только количество участников.

results.question: Средний score по каждой метрике оценки
results.expected_sql: SELECT m.name, AVG(lr.score) AS avg_score FROM metric m JOIN competition_config cc ON cc.metric_id = m.metric_id JOIN participation p ON p.competition_id = cc.competition_id JOIN leaderboard_row lr ON lr.participation_id = p.participation_id GROUP BY m.name
results.generated_sql:
SELECT m.name, AVG(lr.score) AS avg_score
FROM metric m
JOIN competition_config cc ON m.metric_id = cc.metric_id
JOIN participation p ON cc.competition_id = p.competition_id
JOIN leaderboard_row lr ON p.participation_id = lr.participation_id
GROUP BY m.name;

results.question: Пользователи без участия ни в одном соревновании
results.expected_sql: SELECT u.username FROM user u WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM participation p WHERE p.user_id = u.user_id)

judge.error: SELECT возвращает неверные столбцы (COUNT(*) вместо списка имён пользователей).

results.question: Какой лимит отправок в день у соревнования House Price?
results.expected_sql: SELECT cc.max_daily_submissions FROM competition c JOIN competition_config cc ON cc.competition_id = c.competition_id WHERE c.title ILIKE '%House Price%'
results.generated_sql:
SELECT cc.max_daily_submissions
FROM competition_config cc
JOIN competition c ON c.competition_id = cc.competition_id
WHERE c.title ILIKE '%House Price%';

results.question: Победитель (1-е место) в каждом завершённом соревновании — имя участника и его лучший результат
results.expected_sql: SELECT c.title, u.username, lr.score FROM (SELECT lr.participation_id, lr.score, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY p.competition_id ORDER BY lr.score DESC) AS rnk FROM leaderboard_row lr JOIN participation p ON p.participation_id = lr.participation_id JOIN competition c ON c.competition_id = p.competition_id WHERE c.status = 'finished') ranked JOIN leaderboard_row lr ON lr.participation_id = ranked.participation_id JOIN participation p ON p.participation_id = lr.participation_id JOIN competition c ON c.competition_id = p.competition_id JOIN user u ON u.user_id = p.user_id WHERE ranked.rnk = 1
results.generated_sql:
SELECT u.username, lr.score
FROM competition c
JOIN participation p ON p.competition_id = c.competition_id
JOIN leaderboard_row lr ON lr.participation_id = p.participation_id
JOIN user u ON u.user_id = p.user_id
WHERE c.status = 'finished' AND lr.rank = 1;

results.question: Соревнования у которых суммарный объём датасетов превышает 100 МБ и при этом участников не менее пяти
results.expected_sql: SELECT c.title, SUM(fa.size_bytes) AS total_bytes, COUNT(DISTINCT p.participation_id) AS participants FROM competition c JOIN dataset d ON d.competition_id = c.competition_id JOIN file_artifact fa ON fa.dataset_id = d.dataset_id JOIN participation p ON p.competition_id = c.competition_id GROUP BY c.title HAVING SUM(fa.size_bytes) > 104857600 AND COUNT(DISTINCT p.participation_id) >= 5
results.generated_sql:
SELECT c.title
FROM competition c
JOIN dataset d ON c.competition_id = d.dataset_id
JOIN file_artifact fa ON d.dataset_id = fa.dataset_id
JOIN participation p ON c.competition_id = p.competition_id
WHERE (
  SELECT SUM(fa.size_bytes) 
  FROM file_artifact fa 
  WHERE fa.dataset_id IN (
    SELECT dataset_id 
    FROM dataset d 
    WHERE d.competition_id = c.competition_id
  )
) > 100 * 1024 * 1024
AND (
  SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.participation_id) 
  FROM participation p 
  WHERE p.competition_id = c.competition_id
) >= 5;

judge.error: Используются неправильные таблицы и столбцы в JOIN условиях.
